seoTitle: Goranba vs Gordon Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goranba and Gordon Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Goranba vs Gordon Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goranba and Gordon Park.
heading: Goranba vs Gordon Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goranba, Queensland and Gordon Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goranba has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gordon Park (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goranba or Gordon Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goranba has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Gordon Park scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goranba scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Gordon Park scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goranba or Gordon Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goranba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
